thread: Can the Hearthglen road and Arthas become the outside force the field team now needs?

evidence.clue: Sylvanas reaches Arthas's camp and successfully reframes the plague as a grain-road war.
Arthas mobilizes immediately toward Hearthglen and the wider southern line.
Chapter 13 relay traffic reports that Hearthglen is overwhelmed and Arthas is already moving toward Stratholme.
A south-track relay in chapter 13 reports that Hearthglen is already overwhelmed and Arthas is moving toward Stratholme.
The trio does not stop to repair the partnership because the Arthas line has already rolled past containment into the next city-scale crisis.
Relay traffic reports that Hearthglen nearly failed again after dark, proving the town was never truly stabilized.
Arthas does not remain at Hearthglen; he takes the main body south-east at speed, making Stratholme the live crisis point.
Jaina and Sylvanas now chase a moving fuse rather than a fixed destination, with the chapter explicitly framing Stratholme as the next place where warning may arrive too late.
Hearthglen is shown directly as a held-but-failing town, proving the earlier relays were not exaggerating the line’s instability.
Arthas receives the full plague picture at Hearthglen and still immediately shifts the crisis point forward to Stratholme.
Jaina, Sylvanas, and Cyndia leave Hearthglen on a head-start run that now explicitly races Arthas’s main column toward the same city.
Arthas reaches Stratholme before the city is entered in force and receives Jaina's report at the gate, showing the Hearthglen line has fully matured into a Stratholme decision point.
Arthas reaches Stratholme’s gate in time to hear Jaina’s answer and to set policy for the city immediately.
His answer is the Culling, resolving the question of what kind of outside force Hearthglen and the road had delivered into the crisis.

readerKnows: The thread’s answer is yes, but catastrophically. Arthas is reached, present, and fully operational at Stratholme — and his intervention becomes the Culling.
povCharacterKnows: Sylvanas and Jaina no longer have to wonder what Arthas will do once he has the truth. Chapter 17 gives them the answer in full view of the gate and the wall.
notes: Resolved in chapter 17. Arthas becomes the outside force the field team reached for, but he answers Stratholme in the worst available way.
